hasAttributes.name: loanApplicationLiabilityId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for entity instances.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was modified.

hasAttributes.name: statecode
hasAttributes.description: Status of the Loan Application Liability.

hasAttributes.name: statuscode
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the Loan Application Liability.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Sequence number of the import that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: timeZoneRuleVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: UTCConversionTimeZoneCode
hasAttributes.description: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: The name of the liability listed on the application.

hasAttributes.name: accountNumber
hasAttributes.description: Account number for the liability held in financial institution.

hasAttributes.name: balance
hasAttributes.description: The amount of outstanding balance owed on this liability.

hasAttributes.name: balance_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the Balance in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: bank
hasAttributes.description: The bank to which a particular liability is owed.

hasAttributes.name: city
hasAttributes.description: The city where this liability is located.

hasAttributes.name: countryRegion
hasAttributes.description: The country or region where this liability is located.

hasAttributes.name: description
hasAttributes.description: Description of the liability.

hasAttributes.name: isPayOffPending
hasAttributes.description: When true, indicates that the liability will be paid off at or before closing.

hasAttributes.name: liabilityType
hasAttributes.description: The type of the liability.

hasAttributes.name: loanApplication
hasAttributes.description: A reference to the loan application entity.

hasAttributes.name: monthlyPaymentAmount
hasAttributes.description: The dollar amount of the monthly payment required on this particular liability.

hasAttributes.name: monthlypaymentamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: The amount of the monthly payment required on this application liability, in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: remainingTermsMonths
hasAttributes.description: The number of remaining months owed to satisfy this liability.

hasAttributes.name: stateProvince
hasAttributes.description: The state or province of the primary address related to this loan application liability.

hasAttributes.name: street1
hasAttributes.description: The first line of the address related to this real estate liability.

hasAttributes.name: street2
hasAttributes.description: The second line of the address related to this real estate liability.

hasAttributes.name: street3
hasAttributes.description: The third line of the address related to this real estate liability.

hasAttributes.name: zipPostalCode
hasAttributes.description: The ZIP Code or postal code for the primary address related to this liability listed in the loan application.

hasAttributes.name: balancedisplayvalue
hasAttributes.description: Display value shows the balance of the liability as a positive value. That is, a liability with an accounting value of -500 will appear as 500.

hasAttributes.name: balancedisplayvalue_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the Balance display value in base currency.

definitions.description: Liability associated with the loan application.
